title: Public-site deployment readiness: static hosting docs and pre-deploy safety checklist
problem: The public site is a static export but nothing documents how to deploy it, what the pre-deploy checklist is, or how snapshot refreshes reach production safely. Public-facing currently means localhost only.
evidence: apps/public-site/out/ exists after npm run build
acceptance_criteria: An operator can deploy the static export from apps/public-site/out/ following docs alone.
Pre-deploy checklist requires passing safety_auditor --audit full and reviewed snapshot diff.
No new public routes or server-side surface added.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not add cloud provider adapters or live deployment automation.
Do not change public export schema or committed public JSON in this ticket.
Do not implement ticket-043 safety gate expansion.
